name: web-scraper
description: Scrape websites using Apify Actors. Describe what you want to scrape in plain English and the agent will find the right Actor, configure it, run it, and return the results.
instructions:
When the user asks to scrape a website or extract data from the web:
1. Use apify.store to search for an appropriate Actor (e.g., 'web scraper', 'google maps scraper', 'twitter scraper')
2. Select the best Actor based on the user's needs
3. Use apify.run with sync=true to run the Actor with appropriate input
4. Present the results in a readable format

Common Actors:
- apify/web-scraper: General-purpose web scraper
- apify/cheerio-scraper: Fast HTML scraper
- apify/puppeteer-scraper: JavaScript-rendered pages
- apify/google-search-scraper: Google search results
- apify/instagram-scraper: Instagram profiles and posts

Always explain what Actor you're using and why.
